title: Temenos Banking Account
description: Schema for Temenos banking account arrangements including current accounts, savings accounts, deposits, and loans with balance information and product configuration.

accountId.description: Unique account identifier assigned by the Temenos system

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer who owns the account

productId.description: Product identifier defining the account terms and conditions

status.description: Current operational status of the account

closingDate.description: Date the account was closed, null if still active

interestRate.description: Applied interest rate as a percentage

maturityDate.description: Maturity date for term deposits and loans

branchId.description: Branch identifier where the account is held

AccountBalances.description: Account balance breakdown across different balance types

workingBalance.description: Current working balance including all posted transactions

availableBalance.description: Balance available for new transactions after holds and limits

lockedAmount.description: Amount currently held or locked for pending operations

clearedBalance.description: Balance of cleared and settled funds only
